threads.subject: Smart - Scale - Ticket 12028 - Smart Scale - SQL Server License Verification

llm_summary.one_line: Customer SQL Server license violation: clarify Aptum's liability and ownership for enforcement.
llm_summary.summary: Barbara raised concern that Aptum could be liable and fined if Microsoft audits a customer's SQL Server license misuse. Adam looped in Fred Taylor-Young from InfoSec/former Abuse team. Fred clarified that Abuse historically handled service misuse (bitcoin mining, illegal sites), not software license violations, and questions whether Aptum should police customer license compliance at all given potential liability from misinterpretation. The ticket fell through cracks after the Abuse manager departed. Adam needs to decide: who owns this issue, what Aptum's policy should be on customer license violations, and how to proceed with this specific customer.
my_actions: Determine whether customer software license violations are Aptum's responsibility to police or report
Clarify Aptum's liability exposure if customer is audited by Microsoft for license misuse
Decide which team (Service Delivery, InfoSec, Legal, Account Management) should own customer license compliance issues
Provide direction on how to handle this specific Smart Scale SQL Server license case
tracked_actions: Fred Taylor-Young and InfoSec team awaiting policy guidance on handling license violation tickets
Barbara and Service Delivery team need clarity on their obligations when discovering customer license issues
llm_summary.suggested_reply: Thanks Fred for the context. You're right that customer software license compliance shouldn't fall under Abuse. I'll loop in Legal to clarify our liability exposure and contractual obligations here. My initial take: we should notify customers of potential violations we discover, but policing their license compliance isn't our responsibility unless it creates direct risk to Aptum. Let me confirm our position and get back to the team with clear ownership and process. Barbara, hold on this specific ticket until we have guidance.
